text: American Express demonstrated revenue growth momentum through 2025, with Q3 2025 revenue reaching $10,415,000,000 compared to $9,716,000,000 in Q3 2024. According to the YoY growth analysis, Q3 2025 posted 0.91% year-over-year growth, following stronger expansion of 7.22% in Q2 2025 and a slight contraction of -0.93% in Q1 2025. This pattern suggests moderating but positive revenue trajectory as the company progressed through the fiscal year.
